evidence_summary: Reintegrate the cowardly_lion into the traveling group following his rescue from a poppy field. The scene establishes the transition from individual recovery to collective movement toward the Emerald City through a landscape defined by green-painted structu...

After being rescued from a poppy field by mice, the Cowardly Lion reunites with Dorothy, Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, and Toto. The group continues their trek along the yellow brick road through a landscape characterized by green-painted houses and emerald attire.
Relief (from the Lion's rescue) to steady determination.
cowardly_lion is being reintegrated into the group after poppy field rescue.
The full group walks steadily along the yellow brick road toward the Emerald City.
The group reunites and continues their trek through the green countryside.
